translations.vi: Chúng tôi đi ngay bây giờ.

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun (impersonal/colloquial ‘we’), 3rd person singular; syntactic subject of the verb.
Finite verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; main predicate; transitive selecting a direct object.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiners the noun ‘route’.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of ‘prend’.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb phrase (‘prend’).

sentences.target: La route est bloquée par un camion.
sentences.reading: /la ʁut ɛ blɔke paʁ œ̃ kamjɔ̃/

translations.fr: La route est bloquée par un camion.
translations.ipa: /la ʁut ɛ blɔke paʁ œ̃ kamjɔ̃/
translations.en: The road is blocked by a truck.
translations.es: La carretera está bloqueada por un camión.
translations.de: Die Straße ist durch einen Lastwagen blockiert.
translations.it: La strada è bloccata da un camion.
translations.zh-Hans: 道路被一辆卡车堵住了。
translations.yue: 條路俾一架貨車阻住咗。
translations.pt: A estrada está bloqueada por um caminhão.
translations.vi: Con đường bị một chiếc xe tải chặn lại.
translations.nl: De weg is geblokkeerd door een vrachtwagen.
translations.hi: सड़क एक ट्रक से अवरुद्ध है.
translations.el: Ο δρόμος είναι μπλοκαρισμένος από ένα φορτηγό.
translations.nb: Vegen er blokkert av en lastebil.
translations.id: Jalan itu tertutup oleh sebuah truk.
translations.sv: Vägen är blockerad av en lastbil.
translations.ro: Drumul este blocat de un camion.
translations.da: Vejen er blokeret af en lastbil.
translations.ja: 道路はトラックに塞がれています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine singular; introduces the subject noun.
Common noun, feminine singular; grammatical subject of the clause.
Auxiliary ‘être’, present indicative 3rd person singular; forms the passive with the participle.
Past participle (feminine singular) functioning as the main predicate in passive; agrees with ‘route’.
Preposition introducing the agent phrase of the passive.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner for ‘camion’.
Common noun, masculine singular; complement of ‘par’ (agent of the passive).

sentences.target: Tu connais cette route pour aller vite.
sentences.reading: /ty kɔnɛ sɛt ʁut puʁ ale vit/

translations.fr: Tu connais cette route pour aller vite.
translations.ipa: /ty kɔnɛ sɛt ʁut puʁ ale vit/
translations.en: Do you know this road to go fast?
translations.es: ¿Conoces esta ruta para ir más rápido?
translations.de: Kennst du diese Strecke, um schneller zu fahren?
translations.it: Conosci questa strada per arrivare più in fretta?
translations.zh-Hans: 你知道走这条路会更快吗？
translations.yue: 你知唔知行呢條路會快啲？
translations.ru: Знаешь эту дорогу, чтобы быстрее доехать?
translations.pt: Você conhece este caminho para chegar mais rápido?
translations.he: אתה מכיר את הדרך הזו כדי להגיע מהר יותר?
translations.tr: Daha hızlı gitmek için bu yolu biliyor musun?
translations.vi: Bạn có biết con đường này để đi nhanh hơn không?
translations.ar: هل تعرف هذا الطريق للوصول بسرعة؟
translations.nl: Ken je deze route om sneller te gaan?
translations.uk: Ти знаєш цю дорогу, щоб швидше доїхати?
translations.hu: Ismered ezt az utat, hogy gyorsabban odaérjünk?
translations.hi: क्या तुम जल्दी जाने के लिए यह रास्ता जानते हो?
translations.pl: Znasz tę drogę, żeby pojechać szybciej?
translations.el: Ξέρεις αυτόν τον δρόμο για να πάμε πιο γρήγορα;
translations.nb: Kjenner du denne veien for å komme raskere fram?
translations.id: Kamu tahu jalan ini supaya lebih cepat sampai?
translations.sv: Känner du till den här vägen för att komma fram snabbare?
translations.ro: Cunoști drumul acesta ca să ajungem mai repede?
translations.cs: Znáš tuhle cestu, abychom jeli rychleji?
translations.da: Kender du denne vej for at komme hurtigere frem?
translations.fi: Tiedätkö tämän reitin, jotta pääsemme nopeammin perille?
translations.ja: 早く行けるこの道、知ってる？

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 2nd person singular; syntactic subject of ‘connais’.
Finite verb, present indicative 2nd person singular; transitive taking ‘cette route’ as object.
Demonstrative determiner, feminine singular; modifies ‘route’.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of ‘connais’.
Preposition introducing a purpose clause (‘pour’ + infinitive).
Infinitive verb; complement of ‘pour’ expressing purpose.
Adverb modifying ‘aller’.

sentences.target: Il marche le long de la route.
sentences.reading: /il maʁʃ lə lɔ̃ də la ʁut/

translations.fr: Il marche le long de la route.
translations.ipa: /il maʁʃ lə lɔ̃ də la ʁut/
translations.es: Camina a lo largo de la carretera.
translations.pt: Ele caminha ao longo da estrada.
translations.vi: Anh ấy đi dọc con đường.
translations.hi: वह सड़क के साथ-साथ चल रहा है.
translations.ja: 彼は道路に沿って歩いている。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 3rd person singular; syntactic subject of ‘marche’.
Finite verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; intransitive predicate.
Definite article (masculine singular) used within the fixed prepositional locution ‘le long de’ (‘along’).
Noun within the fixed expression ‘le long de’; part of a complex preposition meaning ‘along’.
Preposition completing the complex locution ‘le long de’, introducing the NP complement.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner for ‘route’.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the complex preposition ‘le long de’.
